redshiftserverless.namespace.CfnAbout: A collection of database objects and users.

redshiftserverless.namespace.AdminUserna.Description: The username of the administrator for the primary database created in the namespace.

redshiftserverless.namespace.AdminUserPa.Description: The password of the administrator for the primary database created in the namespace.

redshiftserverless.namespace.DbName.Description: The name of the primary database created in the namespace.

redshiftserverless.namespace.DefaultIamR.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM role to set as a default in the namespace.

redshiftserverless.namespace.FinalSnapsh.Description: The name of the snapshot to be created before the namespace is deleted.
How long to retain the final snapshot.

redshiftserverless.namespace.IamRoles.Description: A list of IAM roles to associate with the namespace.

redshiftserverless.namespace.KmsKeyId.Description: The ID of the AWS Key Management Service key used to encrypt your data.

redshiftserverless.namespace.LogExports.Description: The types of logs the namespace can export. Available export types are `userlog`, `connectionlog`, and `useractivitylog`.

redshiftserverless.namespace.NamespaceNa.Description: The name of the namespace. Must be between 3-64 alphanumeric characters in lowercase, and it cannot be a reserved word. A list of reserved words can be found in [Reserved Words](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/redshift/latest/dg/r_pg_keywords.html) in the Amazon Redshift Database Developer Guide.

redshiftserverless.namespace.Tags.Description: The map of the key-value pairs used to tag the namespace.
